name: github-mcp-server
description: GitHub's official MCP server for interacting with repositories, issues, pull requests, actions, code security, and more.
long_description:
The GitHub MCP Server provides comprehensive access to GitHub's API through the Model Context Protocol. Manage repositories, issues, pull requests, GitHub Actions workflows, code security alerts, discussions, notifications, and more — all from your AI assistant.

Requires a GitHub Personal Access Token with appropriate scopes (repo, read:packages, read:org recommended).

tools.name: get_file_contents
tools.description: Get contents of a file or directory from a GitHub repository

tools.name: search_code
tools.description: Search for code across GitHub repositories

tools.name: list_issues
tools.description: List issues in a GitHub repository

tools.name: get_issue
tools.description: Get details of a specific issue

tools.name: create_issue
tools.description: Create a new issue in a GitHub repository

tools.name: add_issue_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to an issue

tools.name: list_pull_requests
tools.description: List pull requests in a repository

tools.name: get_pull_request
tools.description: Get details of a specific pull request

tools.name: get_pull_request_diff
tools.description: Get the diff of a pull request

tools.name: get_workflow_run
tools.description: Get details of a workflow run

github_token.title: GitHub Personal Access Token
github_token.description: A GitHub Personal Access Token with repo, read:packages, and read:org scopes. Create one at https://github.com/settings/personal-access-tokens/new

toolsets.title: Toolsets
toolsets.description: Comma-separated list of toolsets to enable (e.g. repos,issues,pull_requests,actions,code_security). Leave empty for defaults.

github_host.title: GitHub Host
github_host.description: GitHub Enterprise hostname (e.g. github.mycompany.com). Leave empty for github.com.
